scope_notes: No scope file supplied. Treating target as user-authorized.

owasp.name: Broken Access Control
owasp.evidence: Automated safe recon cannot prove authorization flaws.
owasp.safe_next_step: Review authenticated roles, object IDs, admin routes, and server-side authorization checks.

owasp.name: Cryptographic Failures
owasp.evidence: HSTS: missing, TLS: unknown, cookies reviewed: 0
owasp.safe_next_step: Confirm HTTPS-only flows, Secure cookies, HSTS policy, and certificate renewal.

owasp.name: Injection
owasp.evidence: Forms: 0, input-like params: 0. No payloads submitted.
owasp.safe_next_step: Manually test input validation in an authorized test environment.

owasp.name: Insecure Design
owasp.safe_next_step: Threat-model critical flows: signup, payment, upload, password reset, and approval workflows.

owasp.name: Security Misconfiguration
owasp.safe_next_step: Fix missing headers, remove verbose errors, and restrict unnecessary public files.

owasp.name: Vulnerable and Outdated Components
owasp.safe_next_step: Compare confirmed versions against vendor advisories and patch policy.

owasp.name: Identification and Authentication Failures
owasp.evidence: Password forms found: 0. No login attempts performed.
owasp.safe_next_step: Review MFA, password policy, lockout/rate limits, session rotation, and reset flows.

owasp.name: Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp.safe_next_step: Review dependency integrity, SRI for third-party scripts, CI/CD controls, and signed releases.

owasp.name: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owasp.evidence: External recon cannot confirm internal logging coverage.
owasp.safe_next_step: Validate audit logs for auth events, admin actions, errors, alerts, and incident response handoff.

owasp.name: Server-Side Request Forgery
owasp.evidence: URL-like params found: 0. No SSRF requests performed.
owasp.safe_next_step: Manually review URL-fetching features and enforce allowlists, network egress controls, and metadata IP blocks.
